column1: Hey Cole, thanks for your interest in traveling with Go Blue Tours. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text shortly with info and details
What's good! It's Spiffy from Go Blue here
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options and deets
My spring break is the from 3/13-3/21
Cool I got you. which destination were you lookin to book
Word yea cancun is lit for sure. how many ppl in your group so far?
yea thats solid! you all from the same school?
Wordd Glenwood Ave is lit lit lol. Love Raleigh
gonna put this info together for you rn, how soon were you lookin to get things booked?
Lookin to get it done pretty quick hopefully by like end of the week
okay bet yea I'll send what we have at the moment and add a payment plan. lets you reserve things with a deposit and then pay the rest off in a few weeks
is it cool if I send most of the info through email? its a little long for text
dope whats the best email to send to
just sent that over lmk if you got it
Bet lmk what the group thinks
yoo Cole whats good bro, how we feelin about those options so far?
hey checkin in, we narrow down on which option we wanna roll with?
Sorry I didn't get back to you man we're still debating a few options we've been considering including this one
Cool all good bro. what other options we lookin at as of now
A couple of the Riu resorts
okay bet. We do have a Riu Caribe and Riu Cancun option if you wanted to check those out
I have a question about the prices on the site. Are they pre or post tax?
thats your final price all taxes included
One more question, what rooms would we be getting
We're goons go with the 4 night option at grand oasis, trying to go Monday-Friday week of
All if we include a flight what would that increase the price per person to
yoo! word, so its def cheapest to get flights separately on your own. youll save 150-200 bucks on it that way
depends if you want the convenience of it being all in one, or to save money. if you want to save I can also just help you find a good flight to buy
Ok word I think we'll just look for flights on our own then
How do we get a group with 2 rooms of 3 started for those dates?
I can set it up for you rn, were we ready to get things locked in today
yo! just emailed over that reservation. March 16-20, two rooms of 3
I got it, thanks for your help
yea ofc no prob. lmk if you need any help getting on
One member of our group misspelled his email on his profile and can't figure out how to change it. Is he able to or would you have to go in and modify it
He's gonna have to stay home for break man
Lol which person is it? I'll send the email he used for the log in
It was Michael brisard, he meant to type Mnbrisard@gmail.com but he accidentally put gmaul.com
Another one of my friends curious about our tickets. Do we receive them once we've paid in full and how do we receive them. Is it like an Apple wallet thing or something we gotta print out
Hey man just following up on this question from last night. I know it was late so not sure if you had received it
so this will feel odd but Mike is gonna just have to use the incorrect email with the typo to log in. once he gets in he'll be able to change the email
Ok I'll let him know about that

For tickets / vouchers for everything in your package, it'll all be loaded into your accounts within your portal. once youre paid in full and we start the pre-departure process for your group, all your vouchers will be released into your account
And is that a print off thing or something for the Apple wallet
confirmation numbers, and all. you'll also enter your flight info into your flights tab so we can schedule your transportation
I recommend screenshotting everything you have. if you want, you can print it out, but a screenshot will do
I appreciate the help with all these questions
One of my buddies, will, texted you a bit ago about our trip. Did you get his message?
What's up bro, will look through I may have missed it
Yeah we're just looking to cancel our trip and get a refund since we're still in open registration
I can processes a cancellation but you'll want to add the travel insurance to get a refund processed through our partner Travel Insured
Did you see that option during the set up process?
Since we're still in open enrollment this should mean we're entitled to a full refund according to this acknowledgment on your consent form
Ah I see the confusion bro. open enrollment is during the process of signing up. Once someone deposits, they're officially registered and enrolled
Im also not sure I see Will's text, more than happy to text him if you don't mind sending his number
But since the groups still in the window we should be entitled to the refund according to that policy
Morning bro, cool will reach out to him. and yea man essentially that enrollment window enrollment through the 20th which was the deposit date
down to hop on a call to chat it through and break it down
I can also bring the confusion up to the team in our next meeting today. if you dont mind me asking, whats the reason for cancelling?
Will just told me you talked to him but yeah it was supposed to be a bachelor trip for him but we had to cancel because he had a work conference
yea got it. working on seeing what I can do for you guys, will have a plan of action by tonight
Hey spiffy, sorry it's been a little while about this situation, Ivebeen having issues with my credit card. Would it be possible to hop on a call tomorrow to talk about the course of action?
hey Cole. did you see the email I sent over to the group with the refund steps? sent it to you right away after getting approval on what the net steps would be
if you dont see it in your main inbox, select your 'All Mail' tab
sup man wanted to make sure you all got that email
Yeah we got it. working through the process now
Sounds good. if you need any help just lmk
For the travel insurance quote, there's a section for trip cost. Am I putting the full trip cost of 630 or just the amount I've already paid (200)?
I would put the full package price, as if like youre getting the protection for the entire package
in a few days when you submit the refund, youll then put in how much you paid so far
just checkin in on your status bro
hey bro, hows everything on your end
